channel.title: Tprrt's Blog - Embedded Linux
channel.description: Embedded Linux, Zephyr RTOS, open-source hardware, Linux gaming, retro gaming, and competitive fitness

item.title: Yocto Project 6.0 "wrynose" is out
item.description: Yocto Project 6.0 "wrynose", the new LTS release, is out today. Here is an overview of the most notable changes and a note on my own contribution to this release.
item.dc:creator: tperrot
